heading_content_part: Link to privacy policy of third party service providers used by the appGoogle Play ServicesAdMobFirebase AnalyticsFacebookFabricCrashlyticsApplovinThis app (Launcher) needs a few permissions to work, here's why we need them:- INTERNET- QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES - let Launcher perform the function: can display a list of applications that the user has installed- WRITE_SETTINGS - let Launcher perform the function: change brightness,... in control center

decoder_heading: Link to privacy policy of third party service providers used by the app
ident_heading: Link to privacy policy of third party service providers used by the app
heading_content_part: - ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE - let Launcher function: assistive touch and x home bar features- SET_WALLPAPER - let Launcher perform the function: set phone wallpaper- ACCESS_LOCATION - let the Launcher perform the function: display the weather information of your city- BLUETOOTH - let Launcher perform the function: turn off bluetooth in control center- MODIFY_AUDIO_SETTINGS - let Launcher perform the function: change sound in control center

decoder_heading: Link to privacy policy of third party service providers used by the app
ident_heading: Link to privacy policy of third party service providers used by the app
heading_content_part: - FLASHLIGHT - let Launcher perform the function: turn off flash in control center and lock scren- CAMERA - let Launcher perform the function: turn on the camera in control center and lock screen- USE_BIOMETRIC - let Launcher perform the function: fingerprint unlock in lock screen- READ_CONTACTS - let Launcher perform the function: show favorite contacts on widgets, search for contacts in search screen

decoder_heading: Link to privacy policy of third party service providers used by the app
ident_heading: Link to privacy policy of third party service providers used by the app
heading_content_part: - RECORD_AUDIO - let Launcher perform the function: record audio in screen video recording feature in control center- BIND_APPWIDGET - let the Launcher perform the function: create and display widgets on the home screen- MEDIA_CONTENT_CONTROL - let Launcher perform functions: control, play, pause music in control center- STORAGE - let the Launcher do the function: read the home screen wallpaper and lock screen wallpaper

decoder_heading: Link to privacy policy of third party service providers used by the app
ident_heading: Link to privacy policy of third party service providers used by the app
heading_content_part: - READ_PHONE_STATE (request from android 12) - let Launcher perform the function: - read phone wave information for the function of displaying wave column in status bar, catch incoming call event to unlock lockscreenLog DataI want to inform you that whenever you use my Service, in a case of an error in the app I collect data and information (through third party products) on your phone called Log Data. This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol (“IP”) address, device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing my Service, the time and date of your use of the Service, and other statistics.
